title: SERVED Cocktail Variety Pack, 8% ABV, Premium Bar Quality Cocktails, Pre-Mixed & Ready To Drink, 8 x 250ml Cans
features: TASTER PACK - Perfect for those looking to try SERVED Cocktails for the first time - with all four flavours all in one pack. A great way to discover your favourite flavour. The Pack includes 2 x Mojitos, 2 x Pina Coladas, 2 x Passion Fruit Martinis and 2 x Margaritas
PREMIUM BAR QUALITY – Bar quality cocktails made with a double measure of premium spirit, the best naturally sourced ingredients and wonky fruit.
100% NATURAL – our award-winning cocktails are made with only the finest naturally sourced ingredients and premium spirits. We never use any artificial ingredients, sweeteners or colours.
REAL FRUIT – just like your favourite bar, we use real fruit in our cocktails for freshness and flavour. By upcycling ‘wonky’ fruit that is bent, bashed, and bruised, we are able to reduce food waste
BAR STRENGTH – our cocktails are full-strength; we use a 50ml double measure of premium spirit in every can.
description: Product Description Perfect for those looking to try SERVED Cocktails for the first time - with all four flavours all in one pack. A great way to discover your favourite flavour. The Trial Pack includes 2 x Mojitos, 2 x Pina Coladas, 2 x Passion Fruit Martinis and 2 x Margaritas. 8% ABV. A great starter pack filled with ready made cocktails. Ingredients Mojito: Sparkling Water, Served Pure™ White Rum, Apple Juice and Lime Juice from Concentrate, Natural Flavourings, Citric Acid Passion Fruit Martini: Water, Served Pure™ Vodka, Juice from Concentrate (Passion Fruit, Pineapple, Grape) Cellulose Gum, Natural Flavourings, Malic Acid, Natural Colouring (Carrot, Blackcurrent, Carotenes) Pina Colada: Water, Served Pure™ White Rum, Pineapple and Grape Juice from Concentrate, Cellulose Gum, Natural Flavourings, Citric Acid Margarita: Water, Served Pure™ Tequila, Triple Sec, lime extract, lemon juice and grape juice from concentrate, cellulose gum, sodium citrate, natural flavourings. *contains naturally occurring sugars from fruit. Manufacturer Contact Information Served Drinks Ltd, 71-75 Shelton St, London, WC2H 9JQ See more

specifications_table.Storage Instructions: ‎Best before: See base of pack. Store in a cool, dry place away from sunlight.
specifications_table.Manufacturer contact: ‎Served Drinks Ltd, 71-75 Shelton St, London, WC2H 9JQ
